query_normalized: predicting molecular polarity from smiles strings with machine learning chemistry
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it presents a deep learning architecture (FP-GNN) specifically designed to predict molecular properties, including physicochemical characteristics like polarity, using molecular representations (graphs and fingerprints) that are directly relevant to the user's goal of predicting properties from molecular data.
